name: Old Spaghetti Factory Original Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Celery stalks (outside) -- peeled; finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine butter, garlic, onion, and celery in a saucepan. Braise over medium-low heat until the ingredients are tender but not brown.
2. Add flour and mix to form a roux.
3. Drain clams and reserve the juice. In a separate saucepan, combine clam juice, half-and-half, thyme, and salt.
4. Heat until just below boiling point.
5. Add the heated mixture to the roux and cook until the sauce thickens.
6. Stir in the clams until they are evenly distributed throughout the sauce.
7. Serve over noodles.
